name: empty_arch_satisfies_inv
reason: An architecture with zero layers vacuously satisfies inv, allowing a degenerate page table that cannot map any address space

name: unaligned_base_vaddr_well_formed
reason: A directory with base_vaddr=1 (unaligned to any page boundary) passes well_formed because the alignment check is commented out in the source

name: all_invalid_entries_satisfy_inv
reason: A directory where every entry is Invalid vacuously satisfies all inv sub-conditions, meaning the spec permits a page table that maps nothing at all
